Automated process for integrating code changes, running linters, and executing the Jest suite before merging.
Styling layer implemented via Tailwind's utility-first approach for responsive layouts.
Formal structural definitions and validation rules for the internal representation of financial records.
The primary data entity containing a unique identifier, monetary value, currency type, category, description, and timestamp.

Validation logic requiring the amount field to be a positive number strictly greater than zero.

The timestamp of the most recent modification to the project's governing constitution.
The exclusive browser-based storage mechanism used for state persistence, excluding any external databases.
